title: - Any phrases or metaphors they used that “clicked” or stuck

- Any phrases or metaphors they used that “clicked” or stuck

This data will help:
- Build public-facing guides
- Generate comparative UX metaphors
- Train the translation engine for different tones (academic, creative, business, spiritual)
